testcase.name: tests.test_methods
testcase.error: tests/test_methods.py:8: in <module> api = GreenAPI("", "") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ whatsapp_api_client_python/API.py:51: in __init__ self.__prepare_logger() whatsapp_api_client_python/API.py:149: in __prepare_logger self.logger.addHandler(handler) ^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'GreenAPI' object has no attribute 'logger'
